
```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
```

In addition to what is shown on this table, there are weekly homework assignments in your personal GitHub repos.

```{r}
#| echo: false
## Course specifics

slides_repo <- "https://stats6-sp26.github.io/slides/"
gradescope <- "https://www.gradescope.com/courses/1287917"

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
readr::read_csv(here::here("specific-content/schedule.csv")) |> 
  mutate(
    reading = if_else(
      is.na(reading), 
      "",
      paste0(
        '<a href="specific-content/readings/', reading, '" aria-label="Reading for this
        lecture">',
        fontawesome::fa("book"), 
        '</a>'
        )
      ),
    slides = if_else(
      is.na(slides), 
      "",
      paste0('<a href="', slides_repo, slides, '" aria-label="Lecture slides">',
        fontawesome::fa("laptop"), 
        '</a>'
        )
      ),
      assessment = case_when(
      is.na(assessment) ~ paste0(""),
      grepl("qmd", assessment) ~ paste0(
      '<a href="specific-content/assessment/', assessment, '" aria-label="Assessment 
      instructions">',
        fontawesome::fa("list-check"), 
        '</a>'
        ),
      TRUE ~ paste0('<a href="', gradescope, '/assignments/', assessment, '" aria-label="Submit on Gradescope">',
        fontawesome::fa("list-check"), 
        '</a>'
        )
      ),
     other = if_else(
      is.na(other), 
      "",
      paste0(
        "[", 
        fontawesome::fa("note-sticky"), 
        "]",
        "(",
        other, 
        ")"
        )
      )
  ) |> 
  knitr::kable() 
```
